name: More Ginger Snaps
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the shortening for 30 seconds.
2. Add sugar and beat until light and fluffy.
3. Add molasses and water. Mix well.
4. Add baking soda, cinnamon, ginger, and salt. Mix.
5. Finally fold in flour. Mix well.
6. Form into 1-inch balls. Place on a greased cookie sheet, 2 inches apart.
7. Flatten slightly and bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
Makes 36.
